faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about the Universal Principle Generator

items.question: What is the Universal Principle Generator?
items.answer: UPG uses AI to generate interactive 3D visualizations for physics concepts. Each visualization includes Three.js 3D scenes, mathematical formulas, adjustable parameters, knowledge cards, and quizzes.

items.question: How many credits does it cost?
items.answer: Each AI Lab operation costs 200 AI credits, including generate, regenerate, refine, and fork. Failed generations are not charged.

items.question: What topics are supported?
items.answer: UPG currently supports physics concepts — mechanics, waves, electromagnetism, optics, thermodynamics, and modern physics. Chemistry, biology, math, and earth-science are coming soon.

items.question: Can I download the visualization?
items.answer: Yes! Every generated visualization can be downloaded as a standalone HTML file that runs offline in any modern browser.

items.question: What if the generation quality is poor?
items.answer: You can regenerate, refine the prompt, or report issues to help us improve the system.

autopilot.not_supported: AI Tutor not available for this visualization (regenerate to enable)
autopilot.quota_exceeded: Free users get 1 guided session per visualization. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited sessions.
